video_info.title: UFC Fight Night - Evloev vs Murphy
video_info.shortDescription: UFC returns to The O2 Arena, London for a high-stakes Fight Night where two undefeated featherweights, Movsar Evloev and Lerone Murphy, meet in what amounts to a title eliminator. Both fighters enter with long unbeaten streaks and elite wins under their belt making this one of the most anticipated non-title main events of the year Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: UFC returns to The O2 Arena, London for a high-stakes Fight Night where two undefeated featherweights, Movsar Evloev and Lerone Murphy, meet in what amounts to a title eliminator. Both fighters enter with long unbeaten streaks and elite wins under their belt making this one of the most anticipated non-title main events of the year Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.episodeTitle: UFC Fight Night - Evloev vs Murphy - 22 Mar 2026
